description: Represents an ACL for an egress policy of an application component.

IPRanges.description: The list of IP ranges in CIDR notation to match for this ACL.
IPRanges.title: IPRanges

action.description: The action to take for connections egressing from this workload that match this ACL.
action.title: action

hostnames.description: The list of hostnames to match for this ACL. Supports wildcard prefixes, e.g. *.example.com which matches sub1.example.com but not sub2.sub1.example.com, as well as recursive wildcard prefixes, e.g. **.example.com which matches sub1.example.com as well as sub2.sub1.example.com.
hostnames.title: hostnames

title: EgressPolicyACL
